page: Microsoft Azure D2ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor. It features 2 vCPUs mapped to 1 physical core with 2 threads per core, running at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 77 GB of local storage. It is capable of utilizing Premium Storage and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core performance ranking in the top 25%. However, multi-core performance is limited, with stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core scores falling into the bottom 25% and bottom 10% respectively, reflecting the 2-vCPU hardware constraint. Memory bandwidth benchmarks show weak to poor performance, with read-only large block bandwidth at 33.13 GB/sec and write large block bandwidth at 22.28 GB/sec.

This instance is designed for entry-level general-purpose workloads. While single-threaded tasks like gzip compression and bzip3 decompression show average performance, database operations, static web serving, and LLM inference tasks perform poorly. The hardware profile offers a cost-efficient entry point for lightweight applications, development environments, and basic text processing tasks that do not require high memory bandwidth or intensive multi-core parallel processing.
description: Microsoft Azure D2ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 2 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz. Built on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance includes 77 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. Benchmark results demonstrate strong single-core CPU performance, though multi-core capabilities and memory bandwidth are relatively weak. Single-threaded tasks like text processing and compression perform at average levels, whereas database operations and static web serving show lower throughput. This configuration represents a cost-efficient option for lightweight workloads, development environments, and basic single-threaded applications where resource density and dedicated CPU allocation are required without the need for high multi-core scaling.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 77 GB of local storage, powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor for lightweight workloads.

tagline: An entry-level general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing, local storage, and strong single-core performance.
